flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Arizona State University Campus Immersion rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($29.4k → $33.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Arizona State University Campus Immersion fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).
